long long gcd(long long a, long long b) {
    while (b != 0) {
        long long temp = b;
        b = a % b;

}

struct Fraction {
    long long numerator;
    long long denominator;
};

Fraction parseString(const string& s) {
    size_t dot_pos = s.find('.');
    string a_str, b_str, c_str;

    if (dot_pos == string::npos) {
        a_str = s;
        b_str = "";
        c_str = "";
    } else {
        a_str = s.substr(0, dot_pos);
        string fractional = s.substr(dot_pos + 1);
        size_t open_paren = fractional.find('(');
        if (open_paren != string::npos) {
            b_str = fractional.substr(0, open_paren);
            c_str = fractional.substr(open_paren + 1, fractional.size() - open_paren - 2);
        } else {
            b_str = fractional;
            c_str = "";
        }
    }

    long long a = stoll(a_str);
    long long b = b_str.empty() ? 0 : stoll(b_str);
    long long c = c_str.empty() ? 0 : stoll(c_str);
    int lb = b_str.length();
    int lc = c_str.length();

    long long ten_lb = 1;
    for (int i = 0; i < lb; ++i) ten_lb *= 10;

    long long ten_lc = 1;
    for (int i = 0; i < lc; ++i) ten_lc *= 10;

    long long numerator, denominator;

    if (c == 0) {
        numerator = a * ten_lb + b;
        denominator = ten_lb;
    } else {
        numerator = a * ten_lb * (ten_lc - 1) + b * (ten_lc - 1) + c;
        denominator = ten_lb * (ten_lc - 1);
    }

    // Reduce the fraction
    long long gcd_val = gcd(numerator, denominator);
    numerator /= gcd_val;
    denominator /= gcd_val;

    return {numerator, denominator};
}

bool isRationalEqual(string s, string t) {

    // Function to parse a string into numerator and denominator
    auto parse = [](const string& str) -> pair<long long, long long> {
        size_t dot_pos = str.find('.');
        string a_str, b_str, c_str;

        if (dot_pos == string::npos) {
            a_str = str;
            b_str = "";
            c_str = "";
        } else {
            a_str = str.substr(0, dot_pos);
            string fractional = str.substr(dot_pos + 1);
            size_t open_paren = fractional.find('(');
            if (open_paren != string::npos) {
                b_str = fractional.substr(0, open_paren);
                c_str = fractional.substr(open_paren + 1, fractional.size() - open_paren - 2);
            } else {
                b_str = fractional;
                c_str = "";
            }
        }

        long long a = stoll(a_str);
        long long b = b_str.empty() ? 0 : stoll(b_str);
        long long c = c_str.empty() ? 0 : stoll(c_str);
        int lb = b_str.length();
        int lc = c_str.length();

        long long ten_lb = 1;
        for (int i = 0; i < lb; ++i) ten_lb *= 10;

        long long ten_lc = 1;
        for (int i = 0; i < lc; ++i) ten_lc *= 10;

        long long numerator, denominator;

        if (c == 0) {
            numerator = a * ten_lb + b;
            denominator = ten_lb;
        } else {
            numerator = a * ten_lb * (ten_lc - 1) + b * (ten_lc - 1) + c;
            denominator = ten_lb * (ten_lc - 1);
        }

        long long gcd_val = Solution::gcd(numerator, denominator);
        numerator /= gcd_val;
        denominator /= gcd_val;

        return make_pair(numerator, denominator);
    };

    pair<long long, long long> s_frac = parse(s);
    pair<long long, long long> t_frac = parse(t);

    return s_frac.first == t_frac.first && s_frac.second == t_frac.second;
}
